ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size entry */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the sizing standard */,
  "bust_range" TEXT /* Bust measurement range associated with the size */,
  "waist_range" TEXT /* Waist measurement range associated with the size */,
  "hip_range" TEXT /* Hip measurement range associated with the size */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label of the size (e.g., M, L, XL) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional description or notes regarding the size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the size entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the size entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sizing standard */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the sizing standard (e.g., US, EU, UK) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sizing standard and its characteristics */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the size standard was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the size standard was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the size entry */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the sizing standard */,
  "bust_range" TEXT /* Bust measurement range associated with the size */,
  "waist_range" TEXT /* Waist measurement range associated with the size */,
  "hip_range" TEXT /* Hip measurement range associated with the size */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label of the size (e.g., M, L, XL) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional description or notes regarding the size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Designer, Manufacturer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical size entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the size entry */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the sizing standard */,
  "bust_range" TEXT /* Bust measurement range associated with the size */,
  "waist_range" TEXT /* Waist measurement range associated with the size */,
  "hip_range" TEXT /* Hip measurement range associated with the size */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label of the size (e.g., M, L, XL) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional description or notes regarding the size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the historical size entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the historical size entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer preference entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the customer */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the size entry */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Customer rating for the size (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Customer comment for the size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the preference was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the preference was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Customer name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Customer email address */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the customer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the customer was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)
